rulings.Case Title: KHADIJAH GHAFUR VS. WALT DISNEY COMPANY/ABC NEWS, INC. AND AFFILIATES et al (Provide Access)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Specially Appearing Defts The Walt Disney Company Et Al: 1) To Require Ghafure To Post Security As A Condition Of Proceeding, Or, Alternatively; 2) To Declare Ghafur A Vexatious Litigant And Require Her To Post Security As A Condition Of Proceeding
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, February 26, 2010, line 7, DEFENDANTS THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY, AMERICAN BROADCASTING COMPANIES, INC., KGO TELEVISION, INC., KFSN TELEVISION, LLC, Motion By Specially Appearing Defendants The Walt Disney Company, et al: 1) To Require Ghafure to Post Security as a Condition Of Proceeding, or, Alternatively; 2) To Declare Ghafur a Vexatious Litigant and Require Her to Post Security as a Condition of Proceeding. Motion granted. Plaintiff has been declared a vexatious litigant in Los Angeles County Superior Court Case Number EC050452. Plaintiff must post a security in the amount of $10,000 on or before March 19, 2010 as a condition of proceeding with this lawsuit in San Francisco Superior Court Case Number CGC-09-493222. If security is not timely posted, this action will be dismissed. =(302/CWW)
